hooks.command: INPUT=$(cat); FILE=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty' 2>/dev/null); [[ -z "$FILE" ]] && exit 0; if [[ "$FILE" == *.py ]]; then python3 -m py_compile "$FILE" 2>&1 && echo "✅ syntax OK: $(basename $FILE)"; fi; if [[ "$FILE" == *strategies/* || "$FILE" == *demo_trader.py || "$FILE" == *app.py ]]; then cd /Users/jg-n-012/test/fx-ai-trader && python3 scripts/check.py --quiet; fi

INPUT=$(cat); FILE=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty' 2>/dev/null); [[ -z "$FILE" ]] && exit 0; if [[ "$FILE" == *knowledge-base/wiki/* ]]; then cd /Users/jg-n-012/test/fx-ai-trader && echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PostToolUse","additionalContext":"Wiki updated: '"$(basename $FILE)"'. Run /wiki-lint to check for broken links and contradictions."}}'; fi

cd /Users/jg-n-012/test/fx-ai-trader && KB=knowledge-base/wiki && LATEST_SESSION=$(ls -t $KB/sessions/*.md 2>/dev/null | head -1) && echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"SessionStart","additionalContext":"=== KB AUTO-LOAD ===

--- INDEX (Tier + System State) ---
'"$(head -60 $KB/index.md | sed 's/"/\"/g; s/$/\n/' | tr -d '
')"'

--- UNRESOLVED ITEMS ('"$(basename $LATEST_SESSION .md)"') ---
'"$(grep -A 50 '## 未解決事項' $LATEST_SESSION 2>/dev/null | head -20 | sed 's/"/\"/g; s/$/\n/' | tr -d '
')"'

--- LESSONS (Top Mistakes) ---
'"$(head -25 $KB/lessons/index.md | sed 's/"/\"/g; s/$/\n/' | tr -d '
')"'

--- LATEST DAILY REPORT ---
'"$(ls -t knowledge-base/raw/trade-logs/*-daily.md 2>/dev/null | head -1 | xargs head -15 2>/dev/null | sed 's/"/\"/g; s/$/\n/' | tr -d '
')"'
=== END KB AUTO-LOAD ==="}}'
hooks.statusMessage: Loading knowledge base (index + unresolved + lessons + daily)...

hooks.prompt: Before compacting, preserve these critical items from the knowledge-base: 1) Current Tier classifications from knowledge-base/wiki/index.md 2) Independent audit binding recommendations from knowledge-base/wiki/decisions/ 3) Any edge hypotheses being actively evaluated from knowledge-base/wiki/edges/edge-pipeline.md 4) Unresolved items from latest session log. Summarize these into the compaction context so they survive.
